description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named linters that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow should have three jobs: rubocop, clang_format, and clang_static_analyzer, each running on ubuntu-24.04. The rubocop job should set up Ruby 3.4, install dependencies with bundle install, and run rubocop. The clang_format job should install clang-format-20, and run ./bin/check-clang-format. The clang_static_analyzer job should install clang-20 and clang-tools-20, use ccache, run ./bin/check-clang-static-analyzer, and upload a report if the job fails.
